qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: DOM XSS via unsanitized pagination-bullet-element HTML attribute in Swiper Custom Element
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding identifies an HTML attribute to pagination template to setInnerHTML DOM XSS path, not the advisory's extendDefaults prototype pollution bypass through Array.prototype.indexOf in shared/utils.mjs.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: DOM XSS via unsanitized a11y message HTML attributes in Swiper Custom Element
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding identifies an a11y message attribute to notify to setInnerHTML DOM XSS path, not the advisory's extendDefaults prototype pollution bypass through Array.prototype.indexOf in shared/utils.mjs.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described prototype pollution root cause in Swiper. The advisory concerns bypassing the forbidden-key check in shared/utils.mjs by overriding Array.prototype.indexOf and then calling extendDefaults with a __proto__ payload. The two qualifying findings instead describe DOM XSS source-to-sink paths from custom-element attributes through get-element-params.mjs into setInnerHTML.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-hmx5-qpq5-p643 describes prototype pollution in swiper >=6.5.1 and <12.1.2, specifically line 94 of shared/utils.mjs where indexOf is used to check forbidden strings, bypassed by modifying Array.prototype.indexOf before extendDefaults processes a __proto__ payload.

dom-xss-pagination-bullet-element/vulnerability_report.json reports attacker-controlled pagination-bullet-element flowing through get-element-params.mjs into pagination.mjs template construction and setInnerHTML, resulting in DOM XSS.
dom-xss-a11y-message/vulnerability_report.json reports attacker-controlled a11y message attributes flowing through get-element-params.mjs into a11y notify() and setInnerHTML, resulting in DOM XSS.
logs/orchestrator_final_response.md records prototype pollution as a non-finding and lists only the two DOM XSS reports as qualifying findings.
